justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, although the initial query for 'tomorrow around 9' was a bit too specific, leading to an immediate unavailability.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternatives when the initial requests were unavailable, offering options for different times and days.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, only making one slightly redundant check for availability in Turn 4 after the user had already been offered the earliest slot.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was generally positive, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment despite initial unavailability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from initial unavailability, expanding the search to different days and then confirming the earliest available slot on the preferred day.
